description: retryable transport failure example and non-retryable transport failure example for synthetic Phase 3 capability checks.

cases.name: transient transport failure
cases.expectedMapping: preserve the prior authoritative snapshot and retry only as consumer-local policy

cases.name: unsupported capability
cases.expectedMapping: route or block the unsupported operation without marking the run cancelled

cases.name: validation failure
cases.expectedMapping: block until the artifact is corrected

conformanceUse: Loop and Flow consumers can use this example to separate retryable transport failures from non-retryable capability or validation failures.
